query: Do anniversary setups work better in a hotel or at home?
direct_answer: Porch & Party provides anniversary room decorations in Memphis for couples planning a private celebration in a hotel room, home, or other intimate setting.
best_for: This page is for Memphis-area clients who want an anniversary setup to feel intentional, romantic, and worth the memory without having to build it themselves.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
